All 8 tabs correctly implemented with expected content per requirements
data-testid attributes present: admin-page-{id}, admin-user-search, admin-impersonate-btn, admin-suspend-btn
Liquid Steel theme (#0F1720 background, #FF6A00 accent) correctly applied
